prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年理科最低位次约1236名，2024年理科最低位次约3824名，从2021到2024年位次大幅后移约2588名；2022、2023、2025年理科，以2024年3824名为 最近可用基准；2021年理科计划6人，2024年理科计划2人2026年物理类计划5人，较2024年扩招3人（增幅150%），扩招将显著缓解竞 争，使位次数字明显增大（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第53名，近年排名在46-58名区间波动，属全国知名师范类高校；2026年声誉评价偏正面，源于81岁博士毕业的终身学习正面事件；抖音热度一般（总排名第89位，综合热度216149），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；无投档断档 记录；教育学A+（全国顶尖）、中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业2024年 社会热度为分化观望，较2023年小幅降温；物理类招生专业以社会学类、法学类、教育技术学为主，非当前最热门工科方向；青海省2026年考生总数约4800 0人，按近年物理类占比约63.9%估算约30672人，与2025年物理类30457人基本持平，竞争压力无明显变化；华中师范大学位于湖 北武汉，非青海本省或邻省，地域偏好因素中性；该校在青海省招生规模极小，招生计划波动对位次影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年基准位次约3824名、2026年物理类计 划较2024年大幅扩招（从2人增至5人，增幅150%）使竞争明显缓解、学校声誉偏正面但抖音热度一般、师范类专业热度分化观望等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约7236名，区 间6736-7736名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the lowest rank for science was approximately 1236, and in 2024, it was about 3824, with a significant backward shift of about 2588 places from 2021 to 2024; for 2022, 2023, and 2025 science, the 2024 rank of 3824 is used as the most recent available baseline; in 2021, the science enrollment plan was 6 people, in 2024 it was 2 people, and in 2026, the physics category plan is 5 people, an increase of 3 people (150% increase) compared to 2024, which will significantly ease competition and cause the rank number to increase noticeably (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 53rd, with recent rankings fluctuating between 46 and 58, making it a nationally renowned normal university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, stemming from the positive lifelong learning event of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate; Douyin popularity is average (89th overall, comprehensive popularity 216149), with medium-low exposure on short video platforms; no record of enrollment gaps; Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in normal disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of normal/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, slightly cooling compared to 2023; the physics category mainly enrolls in Sociology, Law, and Educational Technology, which are not the most popular engineering directions currently; in 2026, the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province is about 48,000, with an estimated 30,672 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 63.9%, roughly the same as the 30,457 in 2025, so competition pressure shows no significant change; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not in Qinghai Province or a neighboring province, so regional preference factors are neutral; the university's enrollment scale in Qinghai Province is extremely small, and fluctuations in enrollment plans have a significant impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2024 baseline rank of about 3824, the 2026 physics category plan significantly expands compared to 2024 (from 2 to 5 people, a 150% increase), which significantly eases competition, along with a somewhat positive school reputation but average Douyin popularity, and divided wait-and-see popularity for normal majors, the predicted lowest rank for the 2026 physics category is about 7236, with a range of 6736-7736.
